name: Mobile Driver License — Age Verification Template
description: Reads AAMVA mDL credential for age-gated purchase flows. This is a VERIFICATION-side template — the mDL is issued externally by a state DMV, not by this organization.

claims.name: age_over_21
claims.description: Boolean age attestation: holder is 21 or older. Disclosed without revealing exact age.

claims.name: age_over_18
claims.description: Boolean age attestation: holder is 18 or older.

claims.name: given_name
claims.description: Holder given name — optional; requested only when identity confirmation needed.
